description: A love-forever classic, this murcia bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Height: 24 cm Width: 28 cm Depth: 15 cm Textured leatherette upper Two short handles Embossed branding on the front along with the brand badge Fabric inner with a zippered separator, a zippered pocket and two pouches Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
